//: Quests are linear stage lists; dialogue effects move between stages by id (startQuest begins at stages[0], advanceQuest jumps to any stage, completeQuest finishes). 'journal' is the long text in the journal panel; 'hint' is the one-liner on the HUD.

stages.journal: Elder Senna believes whatever silenced the mill is roosting inside it still. The mill path is sealed by the bell-gate, which only opens to the sound of the great bell — and the bell has been stripped and stuffed with hush-wax. Find a way to make it sound, or force the way through. Help wouldn't hurt: Maren Vael is stewing by the quarry road, and there's a stranger by the pond who hums without sound.
stages.hint: Open the bell-gate north of the green.

stages.journal: The bell-gate stands open. Whatever the Hush left in the mill is just up the path now. Go in ready: it is said the Husks dread true sound and living fire, and that a steady party survives what a lone hero doesn't.
stages.hint: Enter the mill and face what roosts there.

stages.journal: The Sentinel is down. Decide what to do with the bell-heart it was guarding.
